channel.title: Swamp Gas on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Swamp Gas on Alien Truth Social

item.title: Paulding Light
item.description:
The Paulding Light is a phenomenon observed in a valley near Paulding, Michigan, with reports dating back to the 1960s. Folklore has offered explanations such as ghosts, geological activity, or swamp gas. However, scientific investigations, including a 2010 study by Michigan Tech students, have concluded that the light is caused by automobile headlights and tail lights on a nearby stretch of US Highway 45. These students were able to recreate the effect by driving a car on that highway and observed vehicle lights through a telescope.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Paulding_Light
